title: Dungeon Crawler World Schema
description: Schema for the Dungeon Crawler World game data files. Defines all available properties and their validation rules.
$comment: Version 2.0 - Updated with enhanced validation and documentation

prerequisites.description: List of prerequisites where each object can contain any schema property as a key with its required value

requirements.description: List of requirements where each object can contain any schema property as a key with its required value

abilities.description: Collection of all abilities and spells available in the game. Each ability can have unique properties, scaling, and effects.

id.errorMessage: Ability ID must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores

target_type.description:
How the ability targets entities or areas:
- self: Affects only the caster
- single: Targets one entity
- area: Affects a circular area
- line: Creates a linear effect
- cone: Creates a cone-shaped effect

scaling.description: Defines how the ability's power increases with character attributes

attribute.description: The primary attribute that affects this ability's power

factor.description: Multiplier that determines how strongly the attribute affects the ability (0-5). Example: 1.5 means 150% of attribute value

skills.description: List of character skills and proficiencies.

classes.description: This is the list of classes provided by the input or connected to the inputs.

sub_classes.description: This is the list of subclasses connected to the input classes.

description.description: Description that can be provided directly or referenced from a markdown file

type.description: This is the type of the thing.

oneOf.description: This is the level of the thing.
This allows for variable and unknown level descriptions.

level.description: This is the level of the thing.

name.description: This is the name of the thing.

range.description: This is the range of the ability. This is measured in Centimeters.
range.$comment: Its measured in Centimeters because that is the smallest measurement unit used regarding range.

duration.description: This is the duration of the ability.

cost.description: This is the cost of using the ability.

cooldown.description: This is the cooldown period for using the ability.

Duration_level_mod.description: This property is deprecated and should not be used!
Duration_level_mod.$comment: This property should not be used!

cooldown_level_mod.description: This property is deprecated and should not be used!
cooldown_level_mod.$comment: This property should not be used!

divine_aspects.description: Defines religious and divine properties for deities and divine entities

domains.description: Spheres of influence for a deity (e.g., 'war', 'healing', 'nature')

worshippers.description: Types of followers or cultures that worship this deity

equipment_slot.description:
Defines where equipment can be worn:
- head: Helmets, circlets
- chest: Armor, robes
- legs: Leg armor, pants
- feet: Boots, shoes
- hands: Gloves, gauntlets
- mainHand: Primary weapons
- offHand: Shields, secondary weapons
- ring: Magical rings (2 slots)
- necklace: Amulets, pendants
- belt: Utility items, pouches

attributeValue.description: Value for attributes like Strength, Dexterity, etc.

damageTypes.description:
Available damage types in the game:
- physical: Direct physical damage
- fire: Heat and flame damage
- ice: Cold and frost damage
- lightning: Electrical damage
- poison: Toxic and venom damage
- holy: Divine and radiant damage
- shadow: Dark and necrotic damage
- arcane: Magical energy damage

attributes.description:
Core character attributes:
- strength: Physical power and carrying capacity
- dexterity: Agility, reflexes, and finesse
- constitution: Health, stamina, and resilience
- intelligence: Learning, memory, and reasoning
- wisdom: Intuition, perception, and willpower
- charisma: Personality, leadership, and social influence

effect.description: Defines temporary or permanent effects that can be applied to entities

id.description: Unique identifier for the effect. Must start with a letter and can contain letters, numbers, and underscores

stackable.description: Whether multiple instances of this effect can stack on the same target

max_stacks.description: Maximum number of times this effect can stack if stackable is true

modifiers.description: List of attribute modifications applied by this effect

type.description:
How the modifier is applied:
- flat: Direct number addition/subtraction
- percentage: Percentage-based modification

markdown_file.description: Path to a markdown file containing the description

description_field.description: Can be either a direct string description or a reference to a markdown file

errorMessage.type: Must be a valid JSON object

properties.level: Level must be a number >= 0 or one of: 'x', '?', 'unknown'
properties.range: Range must be a positive number in centimeters
properties.duration: Duration must be a positive number

examples.name: Fireball
examples.description: A powerful fire spell that engulfs enemies in flames.
